product_overview: Dashboard Leads is a Supabase-backed web app for tracking, managing, and communicating with leads via WhatsApp automation, providing KPIs, funnel visualization, templates, and real-time notifications.
core_goals: Provide a secure, authenticated dashboard for lead monitoring and management.
Visualize lead metrics and funnel progression to improve conversion tracking.
Enable targeted communications via templates and (future) mass messaging.
Support WhatsApp number rotation and automated funnel messages.
Surface real-time notifications and configurable user preferences.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login with email and password through Supabase, protecting routes and persisting sessions.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click "Entrar" button to submit login form -> Automatic redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field with wrong password -> Click "Entrar" button to submit login form -> See error message on invalid credentials -> Stay on /login

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click "Entrar" button to submit login form -> Automatic redirect to /dashboard -> Refresh browser -> Stay on /dashboard (session persistence)

features.name: Dashboard with KPIs and Chart
features.description: Overview page showing KPI cards, conversion chart, recent leads, and date-range filtering.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View KPI cards (total leads, conversion rate, waiting for response) -> Select date range preset "7 days" -> Hover over chart to see tooltip details -> Click refresh button to reload data -> See refreshed KPI values
Navigate to /dashboard -> Pick custom date range using day picker -> See chart update for custom range -> Click "Ver todos" to navigate to /leads -> See /leads
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click refresh button to reload data -> API returns error -> See error message on data load failure

features.name: Leads Management
features.description: Table-based leads management with search, filters, pagination, and separate Automatic/Premium tabs.
user_flows: Navigate to /leads -> Switch to "Automatic Assistant" tab -> Search leads by name or phone number -> See filtered table results -> Navigate pages with pagination controls -> Click WhatsApp icon to open WhatsApp chat
Navigate to /leads -> Switch to "Premium Assistant" tab -> Sort premium leads by time in group -> Change premium status via inline dropdown selector -> See updated premium status in list
Navigate to /leads -> Search leads by name or phone number returning no results -> See "No leads found" message
Navigate to /leads -> Apply status filter from dropdown -> API returns error -> See error message and empty table

features.name: Sales Funnel
features.description: Kanban-style funnel visualization organizing leads by status with per-column counts and detail view.
user_flows: Navigate to /funil -> View leads organized in status columns -> See lead count per column -> Click on lead card to view details -> See lead detail modal
Navigate to /funil -> Refresh funnel data -> See updated columns and counts
Navigate to /funil -> Refresh funnel data -> API returns error -> See error message and stale funnel data

features.name: Mass Messaging (Envios)
features.description: Mass messaging section; main Envios page shows development placeholder while History and Templates sub-pages are functional.
user_flows: Navigate to /envios -> View "Em Desenvolvimento" placeholder overlay -> Click sub-navigation to /envios/historico -> See message history list
Navigate to /envios -> Click sub-navigation to /envios/templates -> See templates list -> Click "+" to create new template
Navigate to /envios -> Attempt to access sending controls on main page -> See "Em Desenvolvimento" message and disabled sending actions

features.name: Message History
features.description: View history of mass sends with filtering and a detail modal for each send.
user_flows: Navigate to /envios/historico -> View list of past mass sends -> Filter by date range and type -> Click an item to open detail modal -> See full send information in modal
Navigate to /envios/historico -> Click refresh button to reload history -> See refreshed history list
Navigate to /envios/historico -> Click an item to open detail modal -> Detail modal fails to load -> See error message in modal

features.name: Message Templates
features.description: CRUD for templates used in mass messaging: create, edit, and delete templates with confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /envios/templates -> View list of existing templates -> Click "+" button to create new template -> Fill template name, type, and messages in form modal -> Click Save -> See new template in list
Navigate to /envios/templates -> Click edit action on existing template -> Modify message content in modal -> Click Save -> See updated template in list
Navigate to /envios/templates -> Click delete action on template -> See Confirm Delete modal -> Confirm delete -> Template removed from list
Navigate to /envios/templates -> Click "+" button to create new template -> Fill invalid data -> Click Save -> See validation errors and prevent save

features.name: Funnel Messages Configuration
features.description: Configure automated messages for funnel steps and follow-ups with timing controls.
user_flows: Navigate to /mensagens -> Switch to "Etapas do Funil" tab -> Edit message content for a funnel section -> Click Save -> See updated message saved
Navigate to /mensagens -> Switch to "Follow-ups" tab -> Configure timing for follow-up message -> Click Save -> See confirmation of saved timing
Navigate to /mensagens -> Edit message content -> Click Save -> API returns error -> See error message and unsaved changes

features.name: WhatsApp Number Management
features.description: Manage WhatsApp numbers and opening messages for rotation: add, edit, toggle active, and delete with confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /numeros -> Switch to "Numeros WhatsApp" tab -> Click Add new number -> Fill number details in form modal -> Click Save -> See new number in list
Navigate to /numeros -> Click toggle to set a number active/inactive -> See number status update in list
Navigate to /numeros -> Click delete on a number -> See Confirm Delete modal -> Confirm delete -> Number removed from list
Navigate to /numeros -> Switch to "Mensagens de Abertura" tab -> Add/edit opening message -> Click Save -> See updated opening message
Navigate to /numeros -> Click Add new number -> Submit invalid phone format -> See validation error and prevent save

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Real-time notification list showing new leads, interest signals, conversions, and group exits with read controls.
user_flows: Navigate to /notificacoes -> View list of notifications with type icons and relative timestamps -> Click a notification to mark individual notification as read -> See notification marked read
Navigate to /notificacoes -> Click 'Mark all as read' control -> See all notifications marked as read and unread count cleared
Navigate to /notificacoes -> Click to mark individual notification as read -> API returns error -> See error message and notification remains unread

features.name: User Settings
features.description: User profile and preferences page to edit display name, toggle notification preferences, and change password.
user_flows: Navigate to /configuracoes -> Edit display name field -> Click save to persist preferences -> See updated display name reflected in profile
Navigate to /configuracoes -> Toggle notification for new leads and toggle notification for conversions -> Click save -> See preferences saved
Navigate to /configuracoes -> Enter current password and new password -> Click save to change password -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /configuracoes -> Enter incorrect current password when changing password -> Click save -> See error message and password not changed

routes.description: User login page with email and password authentication via Supabase
Main dashboard with KPIs, conversion chart, and recent leads list
Leads management with two tabs - Automatic Assistant and Premium Assistant
Sales funnel visualization with Kanban-style columns by lead status
History of mass message sends with filtering and detail view
Message templates CRUD for mass messaging
Funnel message configuration with tabs for funnel steps and follow-ups
WhatsApp number rotation management and opening messages
Notifications page showing new leads, interest, conversions, and group exits
User settings including name, notification preferences, and password change

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login with email and password via Supabase Auth, with protected routes and session persistence
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click "Entrar" button to submit login form
See error message on invalid credentials
Automatic redirect to dashboard on successful login

features.name: Dashboard with KPIs and Chart
features.description: Overview dashboard showing lead metrics, conversion rate chart, and recent leads with configurable date ranges
user_interactions: View KPI cards (total leads, conversion rate, waiting for response)
Select date range presets (Today, 7 days, 15 days, 30 days)
Pick custom date range using day picker
Hover over chart to see tooltip details
Click refresh button to reload data
Open notifications modal from bell icon
Click "Ver todos" to navigate to leads page

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase select from leads table with date filters

features.name: Leads Management
features.description: Table view of all leads with search, filter, pagination. Two tabs for Automatic and Premium assistant leads
user_interactions: Switch between Automatic and Premium tabs
Search leads by name or phone number
Filter leads by status (dropdown)
Navigate pages with pagination controls
Click WhatsApp icon to open WhatsApp chat
Change premium status via inline dropdown selector
Sort premium leads by time in group

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase select from leads table with filters and pagination

features.name: Sales Funnel
features.description: Kanban-style funnel visualization showing leads organized by status columns
user_interactions: View leads organized in status columns
See lead count per column
Click on lead cards to view details
Refresh funnel data

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase select from leads table grouped by status

features.name: Mass Messaging (Envios)
features.description: Mass message sending to leads (currently under development, shows placeholder UI)
user_interactions: View "under development" placeholder
Navigate to History and Templates via sub-navigation

features.name: Message History
features.description: View history of past mass message sends with filtering and detail modal
user_interactions: View list of past mass sends
Filter by date range and type
Click to open detail modal with full send information
Refresh history data

features.name: Message Templates
features.description: CRUD operations for message templates used in mass messaging
user_interactions: View list of existing templates
Click "+" button to create new template
Edit existing template via card action
Delete template with confirmation modal
Fill template name, type, and messages in form modal

features.name: Funnel Messages Configuration
features.description: Configure automated messages for each funnel step and follow-ups
user_interactions: Switch between "Etapas do Funil" and "Follow-ups" tabs
Edit message content for each funnel section
Save message changes
Configure timing for follow-up messages

features.name: WhatsApp Number Management
features.description: Manage WhatsApp numbers for rotation and opening messages
user_interactions: Switch between "Numeros WhatsApp" and "Mensagens de Abertura" tabs
Add new WhatsApp number
Edit existing number
Delete number with confirmation
Toggle number active/inactive
Add/edit/delete opening messages

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Real-time notifications for new leads, interest signals, conversions, and group exits
user_interactions: View list of notifications
Mark individual notification as read
Mark all notifications as read
See notification type icons and relative timestamps

features.name: User Settings
features.description: Configure user profile name, notification preferences, and change password
user_interactions: Edit display name
Toggle notification for new leads
Toggle notification for conversions
Enter current password and new password to change
Click save to persist preferences

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase Auth updateUser for password change

known_limitations.issue: Mass messaging (Envios) page is a placeholder with "Em Desenvolvimento" overlay
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot send mass messages; only history and templates sub-pages are functional

known_limitations.issue: App requires Supabase environment variables (VITE_SUPABASE_URL, VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY) to run
known_limitations.impact: App will throw error on startup if env vars are not configured
